checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain identity verification for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Verify that users submitting Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) are verified through on-chain identity mechanisms to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form is publicly accessible or the link can be easily obtained by unauthorized parties.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement out-of-band verification linking off-chain identity to on-chain identity, such as on-chain attestations or signed proofs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Record of on-chain identity verification steps or signed attestations.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong cryptographic signatures to validate Reward Vault (RFRV) submissions
checklist_items.description: Require cryptographically signed attestations from Protocol Owners for RFRV submissions to ensure authenticity and prevent forgery.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form submission process does not adequately verify the true identity of the submitter.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use on-chain signatures or digital attestations verified by the review team.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed attestations matching submitted data and verified on-chain or via cryptographic verification.

checklist_items.title: Configure access controls and audit logs for the Governance Forum platform
checklist_items.description: Enforce strict access controls and maintain immutable audit logs for all forum modifications to prevent unauthorized changes or impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum Website allows account creation without strong verification of identity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement role-based access controls, multi-factor authentication for moderators, and cryptographically signed posts where possible.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing signed posts, access records, and change history.

checklist_items.title: Apply rate limiting and CAPTCHAs to prevent DoS on RFRV submission and review endpoints
checklist_items.description: Implement rate limits and CAPTCHA verification to hinder spam and denial-of-service attacks against the RFRV platform.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may lack effective CAPTCHA or rate-limiting for submissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enable CAPTCHA in Google Forms or substitute with third-party form providers that support such features, and enforce request limits on review interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Logs of request rates before and after mitigation, CAPTCHA verification records.

checklist_items.title: Verify signer identities and enforce multisig quorum in Guardian multisig system
checklist_items.description: Ensure guardians' private keys are stored securely and signatures are cryptographically verified; monitor for privileges escalation and enforce M-of-N requirements.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A Guardian's private key used for the multisig can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-party signature schemes, and multi-factor key management; implement on-chain verification of signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification logs, key management audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement end-to-end cryptographic signature verification for all on-chain governance and voting transactions
checklist_items.description: Require that all proposals, votes, and cancellations are cryptographically signed and verified before processing to prevent spoofing and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The contract does not correctly verify signatures or vote integrity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain signature verification, enforce participant eligibility checks, and use nonce or replay-prevention mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature verification records, on-chain event logs.

checklist_items.title: Enable monitoring and alerts for unusual activity in reward distribution and incentive claiming contracts
checklist_items.description: Set up real-time monitoring, anomaly detection, and alerts for suspicious or unexpected transactions to promptly identify exploits or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Vulnerabilities in Reward Vault contracts can lead to loss of rewards or staked principal.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy transaction monitoring tools, set alerts for large or unusual activity, and conduct periodic audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, alert logs, audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the forum requires wallet-based login for RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Ensure users submitting Request for Reward Vaults are verified via their on-chain identity or wallet-based login to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission process via Google Forms lacks a robust mechanism to verify the true identity of the submitter as a legitimate Protocol Owner.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement mandatory out-of-band verification like linking to verified on-chain identity before processing RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified identities or linked wallet IDs for RFRV submitters.

checklist_items.title: Enforce end-to-end cryptographic signatures on all proposal creation transactions
checklist_items.description: Require users to sign proposals with their private keys, and verify signatures on-chain to prevent tampering or impersonation during governance proposal submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal data could be altered by a compromised BeraHub (205) before it's sent to the Governance Contract (203).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce signature verification at the governance contract level and on BeraHub, and verify proposal hashes before acceptance.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain records of signed proposal transactions with signature validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that forum account submissions for Reward Vault whitelisting are linked to verified on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the process of submitting RFRVs on the forum requires users to authenticate via wallet-based login or on-chain verification to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form process does not adequately verify the true identity of the submitter as a legitimate Protocol Owner.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement OAuth 2.0 with wallet-based authentication or verify submitters via on-chain attestation mechanism.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified on-chain identity linked to forum account at submission time.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and CAPTCHA on the Google Form used for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Reduce risk of spam or automated submissions overwhelming the RFRV review process by deploying CAPTCHA and rate limiting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Google Form lacks effective anti-spam measures, making it vulnerable to flooding attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure CAPTCHA (e.g., reCAPTCHA) on the form and set request rate limits based on IP or submitter.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration logs and monitoring reports showing CAPTCHA deployment and request rate metrics.

checklist_items.title: Ensure smart contract handling Reward Vault whitelisting has formal verification and security audits
checklist_items.description: Perform rigorous security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault smart contracts prior to whitelisting, to prevent tampering or logical flaws.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts might contain logical flaws allowing tampering or reward misdistribution.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct formal verification and third-party audits of Reward Vault contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying correctness of reward logic and ownership checks.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict ownership checks when processing delegation and redemption transactions
checklist_items.description: Verify that transactions for delegation ($BGT) and redemption correctly validate sender ownership and amounts before execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Delegation and redemption logic may accept or process transactions without proper ownership validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement ownership verification via cryptographic signatures or on-chain ownership checks at the smart contract level.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing ownership validation processes, or code audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Require digital signatures and on-chain validation for emission configuration updates ($BGT rewards)
checklist_items.description: Validate that configuration changes to reward allocations are signed by authorized validators and recorded on-chain to prevent spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The $BGT award configuration updates may be submitted without cryptographic proof of authenticity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require digital signatures from validator nodes and store on-chain proofs of update actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction signatures and audit logs confirming on-chain recording of signed configuration updates.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive access controls and audit logs for governance and proposal actions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all governance-related actions, including proposal creation, cancellation, and voting, are cryptographically signed, logged immutably, and require verified signer identities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance actions may be initiated without proper cryptographic validation and audit trailing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain multi-party signatures, maintain immutable audit logs, and enforce strict signer verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain signatures, audit logs, and verification records showing signer identities.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the governance forum requires wallet-based login or verified on-chain identity for RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Ensure that users submitting Request for Reward Vaults (RFRVs) are authenticated via wallet or on-chain identity to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots or audit logs showing verified on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of RFRV submissions to prevent tampering and ensure non-repudiation
checklist_items.description: Require that RFRV submissions are accompanied by cryptographic proofs linked to the submitter's verified on-chain identity to prevent tampering and repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission process via Google Forms lacks strong verification, allowing impersonation and tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures or on-chain attestations from submitters before processing RFRVs
checklist_items.evidence_required: Cryptographic signature verification logs or on-chain attestations.

checklist_items.title: Configure Google Form and associated processes to minimize collection of sensitive PII and enforce strict access controls
checklist_items.description: Limit the collection of personally identifiable information (PII) in RFRV submissions and ensure only authorized personnel can access the form data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may contain PII that could be exposed if permissions are misconfigured or breach occurs.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Set strict access controls on the form and linked Google account; avoid collecting unnecessary PII.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies and audit logs showing restricted permissions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the moderation and anti-spam measures are in place on the Governance Forum (e.g., CAPTCHA, rate limiting) to prevent DoS attacks and spam
checklist_items.description: Implement technical controls such as CAPTCHA and rate limiting to reduce the risk of spam and denial of service attacks against the forum.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum website may lack robust anti-spam, rate-limiting, or DDoS mitigation measures.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Integrate CAPTCHA, rate limiting, and spam filtering mechanisms into the forum platform.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records and logs demonstrating implementation of these controls.

checklist_items.title: Verify the integrity of submitted governance proposals using cryptographic signatures or on-chain validation to prevent tampering
checklist_items.description: Implement cryptographic verification of proposal data to ensure proposals have not been tampered with during submission or transit.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal data could be altered by a compromised BeraHub or during transit.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require proposal data to be signed by the proposer and verified on-chain before enactment.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Cryptographic signature verification logs; on-chain verification records.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor audit logs for Guardian multisig actions to prevent repudiation and ensure accountability
checklist_items.description: Maintain immutable and publicly accessible audit logs of all multisig actions, with multi-factor authentication where feasible, to prevent repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian multisig actions may not be sufficiently auditable or attributable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use on-chain logging with digital signatures from Guardians for all multisig actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Immutable audit logs with verified signatures for multisig decisions.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Governance Forum employs strong identity verification for RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the forum requires wallet-based login or on-chain identity proof to authenticate Protocol Owners submitting RFRVs, preventing impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form is publicly accessible or the link can be easily obtained by unauthorized parties.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement mandatory out-of-band verification, such as linking with verified on-chain identities before processing RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs demonstrating verification steps and recorded wallet or on-chain identity at submission.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signature verification for RFRV submissions to prevent forging or tampering
checklist_items.description: Use digital signatures or on-chain attestations to verify the authenticity and integrity of RFRV data before processing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission data may be altered if an attacker gains access to the Google Form's backend or if data is not end-to-end integrity protected.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures from Protocol Owners on RFRV data, verified before whitelisting.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification logs showing signature validation results and recorded signatures.

checklist_items.title: Ensure that the reward vault whitelist status is transparently updated and communicated to LPs
checklist_items.description: Implement UI indicators and notifications on BeraHub regarding the current whitelist status of Reward Vaults for $BGT emissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: LPs are unaware of current whitelist statuses when staking.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Display real-time whitelist status and notify LPs if their vault's eligibility changes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of UI flags/notifications during staking and whitelist updates.

checklist_items.title: Configure rate limiting and anti-spam measures on the RFRV submission and review process
checklist_items.description: Prevent token spamming or flooding attacks by implementing rate limits, CAPTCHAs, or CAPTCHA-like mechanisms on submission portals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form lacks effective CAPTCHA or rate-limiting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enable CAPTCHA, IP-based rate limiting, and review queues for submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Logs showing submission rate caps being enforced.

checklist_items.title: Maintain end-to-end integrity checks for transaction submissions to prevent tampering during transit
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain or client-side signature schemes to verify that transaction parameters (e.g., delegation amount, redemption details) are not altered by malicious intermediaries.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transaction details can be altered in transit if data is not properly protected.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require users to sign critical transaction data with private keys before sending; verify signatures on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain logs or signed messages confirming data integrity.

checklist_items.title: Communicate the risks of interacting with fake or malicious dApps to users clearly
checklist_items.description: Educate users to verify dApp URLs, contract addresses, and transaction details before approval, reducing the risk of phishing and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may not be able to distinguish fake Honey Swap dApps from legitimate ones.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Provide user guidelines, official URLs, and warnings in wallet interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Educational materials and training sessions documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure access controls and audit logs for governance proposals and voting actions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all proposals, votes, and multisig actions are signed, logged immutably on-chain, and monitored for suspicious activity to prevent spoofing or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance process relies on signatures and logs that could be altered or spoofed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographic signatures and maintain on-chain logs for all governance activities; implement multi-party signing for multisig actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs with cryptographic signatures corresponding to each action.

checklist_items.title: Regularly audit smart contracts involved in reward distribution, staking, and redemption for logical vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Conduct security audits, formal verification, and bug bounty programs to detect and fix vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward distribution and staking contracts may contain vulnerabilities affecting integrity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Schedule regular audits, apply formal methods, and run bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and bug bounty submissions documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual activity in governance, reward, and staking processes
checklist_items.description: Detect anomalies such as unexpected proposal cancellations, reward claims, or delegation changes, to prevent malicious tampering or abuse.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious or tampered actions may generate detectible patterns.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Set up real-time monitoring, logging, and alerts for governance and reward system activities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards and incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the governance forum requires wallet-based or cryptographic identity verification for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure the forum enforces strong verification linking user accounts to on-chain identities to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form is publicly accessible or the link can be easily obtained by unauthorized parties.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement out-of-band verification, on-chain attestations, or signed submissions before processing RFRVs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verification steps and links to on-chain identities.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and CAPTCHA in the RFRV Google Form to prevent spam and flooding attacks
checklist_items.description: Protect the RFRV submission process from denial-of-service attacks by enforcing request limits and CAPTCHA challenges.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form lacks effective CAPTCHA or rate-limiting for submissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure CAPTCHA, request throttling, and spam filtering in Google Forms or the RFRV submission pipeline.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration screenshots or audit logs demonstrating CAPTCHA enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Verify the implementation of cryptographic signature validation for all on-chain proposal submissions and vote actions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that on-chain proposals and votes are cryptographically signed and validated to prevent tampering and repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The blockchain fails to immutably log the signed transaction for proposal creation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict signature verification at the smart contract level, and ensure wallet/signature scheme is robust.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain transaction logs, code audits confirming signature validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement end-to-end encryption for all sensitive data transmitted between validator nodes and the reward distribution contract
checklist_items.description: Ensure all data flows involving emission configuration are encrypted and signed to prevent tampering or spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Data Flow 310 is not adequately integrity-protected during transit between Validator Node (211) and Distributor Contract (220).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use TLS with mutual authentication or application-level digital signatures for Data Flow 310.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network logs showing TLS or signature validation in data exchange.

checklist_items.title: Regularly audit and verify smart contract logic related to reward and liquidity pool management for vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Conduct continuous security audits and formal verification on smart contracts managing rewards, pools, and stake logic to prevent manipulation and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault smart contract (212) contains a flaw in its reward logic or staking mechanism.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement formal verification, security audits, and bug bounty programs for Reward Vault contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification documentation, and bounty results.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the whitelist status of Reward Vaults is transparently displayed and regularly updated in BeraHub interface
checklist_items.description: Provide real-time, verifiable status of Reward Vaults' whitelisting and emission eligibility to users to prevent staking in unwhitelisted or de-whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A Reward Vault's whitelisting status for $BGT emissions can change or may not be granted.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement dynamic status indicators and notifications in BeraHub, and enforce manual or automated checks before staking.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots or logs showing status updates and notifications.

checklist_items.title: Develop and enforce strict signature verification procedures for governance proposals and votes on-chain
checklist_items.description: Prevent unauthorized or malicious proposals/votes by ensuring only properly signed transactions from eligible entities are accepted.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The user's private keys are compromised, allowing an attacker to sign transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor signature checks, threshold signatures, and on-chain verification schemes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain logs, code audits, signature verification test reports.

checklist_items.title: Apply multi-factor or out-of-band verification for proposal and vote submission to prevent spoofing and impersonation
checklist_items.description: Implement additional identity proof mechanisms beyond cryptographic signatures for proposals and votes, such as on-chain attestations, off-chain verifications, or multi-sig approvals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The blockchain fails to immutably log the signed transaction for proposal creation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adopt multi-factor verification steps, including on-chain attestations, and periodic identity checks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, audit trail logs, attestations.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and request validation for all public transaction submission endpoints to deter spam and flooding attacks
checklist_items.description: Ensure all transaction endpoints, especially proposal and voting submission interfaces, employ rate limits, CAPTCHA, or similar mechanisms to prevent DoS and spam.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BeraHub's proposal submission endpoint (handling DF 303) is susceptible to request flooding.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure rate limiting, CAPTCHA, and request filtering in BeraHub and underlying smart contracts where applicable.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Request logs demonstrating rate limits, CAPTCHA enforcement, and filtering.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an up-to-date list of trusted RPC endpoints and warn users against using unknown or unverified RPCs
checklist_items.description: Prevent users from connecting their wallets to malicious RPC endpoints by maintaining a list of verified RPC URLs and alerting users when adding or switching networks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User has connected their wallet to a malicious or unreliable RPC endpoint.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Provide in-wallet warnings, enable whitelist of verified RPCs, and educate users to verify RPC sources.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Wallet configuration logs, user interface screenshots indicating verified RPCs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault contract enforces strict `msg.sender` verification against a securely maintained list of authorized Incentive Token Managers before allowing incentive modifications.
checklist_items.description: Check if the contract enforces strict and verified `msg.sender` checks against a trusted list to prevent impersonation or spoofing during incentive updates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might have flawed verification of `msg.sender` against authorized Incentive Token Managers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict and verified `msg.sender` checks within the Reward Vault contract against a securely governed list of authorized Token Managers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or source code demonstrating `msg.sender` verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signature verification for all governance proposal submissions to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that proposals submitted via BeraHub are signed with cryptographic signatures verified by the Governance Contract, preventing impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BeraHub (205) or the Governance Contract (203) may lack sufficient non-repudiable logs or on-chain evidence to definitively prove proposal origin.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce robust cryptographic signature verification for all proposal submissions, ensuring correct attribution and preventing spoofing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample signed proposal transactions with verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Require that all transactions involving incentive modifications include cryptographically signed payloads with explicit role and identity attributes.
checklist_items.description: Verify that incentive addition or modification transactions are signed with proofs that clearly specify the sender's role and identity, preventing tampering and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transactions to `deposit_incentives` may be altered by compromised frontend or role assignment logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate cryptographic signatures with role-specific payloads for incentive modifications.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed transaction payloads and audits showing validation of signer role.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of smart contracts managing incentive rates and balances.
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit the smart contracts responsible for incentives to detect and prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for privilege escalation or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may have logic flaws allowing unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits, formal verification, and implement secure development practices for incentive management functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and code review documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement spam filtering, CAPTCHA, and rate limiting on the RFRV submission platform to prevent flooding or DoS attacks.
checklist_items.description: Ensure the RFRV submission interface has protections against spam, flooding, and DoS to maintain availability and processing of valid requests.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may lack protections against flooding, impacting review throughput.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use CAPTCHA, rate limiting, and transition to a purpose-built submission platform with anti-abuse features.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Webhook logs showing rate limits, CAPTCHA implementation status.

checklist_items.title: Configure blockchain signature verification for all governance voting transactions to prevent tampering or impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Validate that the votes are signed with valid cryptographic signatures corresponding to the voter's on-chain identity, preventing vote spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Voting signatures may be weak or re-playable, allowing impersonation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit signature verification procedures that are resistant to replay and forgery in the Governance Contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample votes with verification logs and cryptographic signature checks.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an immutable, transparent on-chain record of multisig signatures and actions to prevent repudiation and verify guardianship actions.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all multisig actions, including proposal cancellations, are recorded in a way that is publicly verifiable and non-repudiable to establish clear accountability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig system may lack official proofs of guardian signatures, leading to disputes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design multisig contracts to emit events with permanent on-chain signatures, and maintain dual logs for auditability.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain audit logs or event records showing signatures and actions.

checklist_items.title: Verify that only verified and authorized guardian keys/signatures are accepted in multisig processes.
checklist_items.description: Strengthen access controls and cryptographic validation for guardian signatures to prevent elevation of privilege via signature forgery or key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig signature validation is vulnerable or weak.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic safeguards, secure key storage, and multi-factor validation for guardian signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature validation scheme documentation and key management audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault contract enforces strict `msg.sender` verification against a securely maintained list of authorized Incentive Token Managers before allowing incentive modifications.
checklist_items.description: Check if the contract enforces strict and verified `msg.sender` checks against a trusted list to prevent impersonation or spoofing during incentive updates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might have flawed verification of `msg.sender` against authorized Incentive Token Managers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict and verified `msg.sender` checks within the Reward Vault contract against a securely governed list of authorized Token Managers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or source code demonstrating `msg.sender` verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signature verification for all governance proposal submissions to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that proposals submitted via BeraHub are signed with cryptographic signatures verified by the Governance Contract, preventing impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BeraHub (205) or the Governance Contract (203) may lack sufficient non-repudiable logs or on-chain evidence to definitively prove proposal origin.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce robust cryptographic signature verification for all proposal submissions, ensuring correct attribution and preventing spoofing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample signed proposal transactions with verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Require that all transactions involving incentive modifications include cryptographically signed payloads with explicit role and identity attributes.
checklist_items.description: Verify that incentive addition or modification transactions are signed with proofs that clearly specify the sender's role and identity, preventing tampering and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transactions to `deposit_incentives` may be altered by compromised frontend or role assignment logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate cryptographic signatures with role-specific payloads for incentive modifications.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed transaction payloads and audits showing validation of signer role.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of smart contracts managing incentive rates and balances.
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit the smart contracts responsible for incentives to detect and prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for privilege escalation or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may have logic flaws allowing unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits, formal verification, and implement secure development practices for incentive management functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and code review documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement spam filtering, CAPTCHA, and rate limiting on the RFRV submission platform to prevent flooding or DoS attacks.
checklist_items.description: Ensure the RFRV submission interface has protections against spam, flooding, and DoS to maintain availability and processing of valid requests.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may lack protections against flooding, impacting review throughput.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use CAPTCHA, rate limiting, and transition to a purpose-built submission platform with anti-abuse features.

checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may lack protections against flooding, impacting review throughput.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use CAPTCHA, rate limiting, and transition to a purpose-built submission platform with anti-abuse features.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Webhook logs showing rate limits, CAPTCHA implementation status.

checklist_items.title: Configure blockchain signature verification for all governance voting transactions to prevent tampering or impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Validate that the votes are signed with valid cryptographic signatures corresponding to the voter's on-chain identity, preventing vote spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Voting signatures may be weak or re-playable, allowing impersonation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit signature verification procedures that are resistant to replay and forgery in the Governance Contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample votes with verification logs and cryptographic signature checks.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an immutable, transparent on-chain record of multisig signatures and actions to prevent repudiation and verify guardianship actions.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all multisig actions, including proposal cancellations, are recorded in a way that is publicly verifiable and non-repudiable to establish clear accountability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig system may lack official proofs of guardian signatures, leading to disputes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design multisig contracts to emit events with permanent on-chain signatures, and maintain dual logs for auditability.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain audit logs or event records showing signatures and actions.

checklist_items.title: Verify that only verified and authorized guardian keys/signatures are accepted in multisig processes.
checklist_items.description: Strengthen access controls and cryptographic validation for guardian signatures to prevent elevation of privilege via signature forgery or key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig signature validation is vulnerable or weak.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic safeguards, secure key storage, and multi-factor validation for guardian signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature validation scheme documentation and key management audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault contract enforces strict `msg.sender` verification against a securely maintained list of authorized Incentive Token Managers before allowing incentive modifications.
checklist_items.description: Check if the contract enforces strict and verified `msg.sender` checks against a trusted list to prevent impersonation or spoofing during incentive updates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might have flawed verification of `msg.sender` against authorized Incentive Token Managers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict and verified `msg.sender` checks within the Reward Vault contract against a securely governed list of authorized Token Managers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or source code demonstrating `msg.sender` verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signature verification for all governance proposal submissions to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that proposals submitted via BeraHub are signed with cryptographic signatures verified by the Governance Contract, preventing impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BeraHub (205) or the Governance Contract (203) may lack sufficient non-repudiable logs or on-chain evidence to definitively prove proposal origin.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce robust cryptographic signature verification for all proposal submissions, ensuring correct attribution and preventing spoofing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample signed proposal transactions with verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Require that all transactions involving incentive modifications include cryptographically signed payloads with explicit role and identity attributes.
checklist_items.description: Verify that incentive addition or modification transactions are signed with proofs that clearly specify the sender's role and identity, preventing tampering and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transactions to `deposit_incentives` may be altered by compromised frontend or role assignment logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate cryptographic signatures with role-specific payloads for incentive modifications.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed transaction payloads and audits showing validation of signer role.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of smart contracts managing incentive rates and balances.
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit the smart contracts responsible for incentives to detect and prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for privilege escalation or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may have logic flaws allowing unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits, formal verification, and implement secure development practices for incentive management functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and code review documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement spam filtering, CAPTCHA, and rate limiting on the RFRV submission platform to prevent flooding or DoS attacks.

checklist_items.title: Configure blockchain signature verification for all governance voting transactions to prevent tampering or impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Validate that the votes are signed with valid cryptographic signatures corresponding to the voter's on-chain identity, preventing vote spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Voting signatures may be weak or re-playable, allowing impersonation.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an immutable, transparent on-chain record of multisig signatures and actions to prevent repudiation and verify guardianship actions.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all multisig actions, including proposal cancellations, are recorded in a way that is publicly verifiable and non-repudiable to establish clear accountability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig system may lack official proofs of guardian signatures, leading to disputes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design multisig contracts to emit events with permanent on-chain signatures, and maintain dual logs for auditability.

checklist_items.title: Verify that only verified and authorized guardian keys/signatures are accepted in multisig processes.

checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature validation scheme documentation and key management audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault contract enforces strict `msg.sender` verification against a securely maintained list of authorized Incentive Token Managers before allowing incentive modifications.

checklist_items.description: Strengthen access controls and cryptographic validation for guardian signatures to prevent elevation of privilege via signature forgery or key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The multisig signature validation is vulnerable or weak.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic safeguards, secure key storage, and multi-factor validation for guardian signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signature validation scheme documentation and key management audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault contract enforces strict `msg.sender` verification against a securely maintained list of authorized Incentive Token Managers before allowing incentive modifications.
checklist_items.description: Check if the contract enforces strict and verified `msg.sender` checks against a trusted list to prevent impersonation or spoofing during incentive updates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might have flawed verification of `msg.sender` against authorized Incentive Token Managers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict and verified `msg.sender` checks within the Reward Vault contract against a securely governed list of authorized Token Managers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or source code demonstrating `msg.sender` verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signature verification for all governance proposal submissions to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that proposals submitted via BeraHub are signed with cryptographic signatures verified by the Governance Contract, preventing impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: BeraHub (205) or the Governance Contract (203) may lack sufficient non-repudiable logs or on-chain evidence to definitively prove proposal origin.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce robust cryptographic signature verification for all proposal submissions, ensuring correct attribution and preventing spoofing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample signed proposal transactions with verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Require that all transactions involving incentive modifications include cryptographically signed payloads with explicit role and identity attributes.
checklist_items.description: Verify that incentive addition or modification transactions are signed with proofs that clearly specify the sender's role and identity, preventing tampering and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transactions to `deposit_incentives` may be altered by compromised frontend or role assignment logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate cryptographic signatures with role-specific payloads for incentive modifications.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed transaction payloads and audits showing validation of signer role.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of smart contracts managing incentive rates and balances.
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit the smart contracts responsible for incentives to detect and prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for privilege escalation or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may have logic flaws allowing unauthorized incentive modifications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct rigorous audits, formal verification, and implement secure development practices for incentive management functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and code review documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement spam filtering, CAPTCHA, and rate limiting on the RFRV submission platform to prevent flooding or DoS attacks.
checklist_items.description: Ensure the RFRV submission interface has protections against spam, flooding, and DoS to maintain availability and processing of valid requests.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV Google Form may lack protections against flooding, impacting review throughput.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use CAPTCHA, rate limiting, and transition to a purpose-built submission platform with anti-abuse features.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Webhook logs showing rate limits, CAPTCHA implementation status.

checklist_items.title: Configure blockchain signature verification for all governance voting transactions to prevent tampering or impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Validate that the votes are signed with valid cryptographic signatures corresponding to the voter's on-chain identity, preventing vote spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Voting signatures may be weak or re-playable, allowing impersonation.

checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample votes with verification logs and cryptographic signature checks.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an immutable, transparent on-chain record of multisig signatures and actions to prevent repudiation and verify guardianship actions.
